description: Event cancelled - title should get CANCELLED prefix

actual.title: CANCELLED: Sprint Review
actual.description: Bi-weekly sprint review and retrospective Meeting cancelled due to team offsite. Will reschedule next week.

content_parts.text:
You are merging calendar event data from multiple emails.

**Existing Event:**
- Title: Sprint Review
- Start: 2026-04-18T14:00:00
- End: 2026-04-18T15:00:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Conference Room A
- Description: Bi-weekly sprint review and retrospective
- Importance: action_required

**New Information (source type: cancellation):**
- Title: Sprint Review
- Start: 2026-04-18T14:00:00
- End: 2026-04-18T15:00:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Conference Room A
- Description: Meeting cancelled due to team offsite. Will reschedule next week.
- Importance: action_required

**Merge Rules:**
1. If source_type is "cancellation", prefix title with "CANCELLED: " (if not already)
2. Prefer specific time (e.g., 6-7pm) over all-day
3. Combine descriptions, keeping all relevant info (append new info)
4. Use most specific location (longer address usually better)
5. Keep newer times if they differ (updates)
6. For importance: keep the highest level (action_required > fyi)

Output JSON with merged event data:
{
    "title": "...",
    "start_datetime": "...",
    "end_datetime": "...",
    "all_day": true/false,
    "location": "...",
    "description": "...",
    "importance": "action_required" or "fyi"
}

    "title": "CANCELLED: Sprint Review",

    "location": "Conference Room A",

    "importance": "action_required"
}
